testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_108] Ensure IAM policies does not allow data exfiltration
[NONE][CKV_AWS_111] Ensure IAM policies does not allow write access without constraints
[NONE][CKV_AWS_107] Ensure IAM policies does not allow credentials exposure
[NONE][CKV_AWS_61] Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow assume role permission across all services
[NONE][CKV_AWS_109] Ensure IAM policies does not allow permissions management without constraints
[NONE][CKV_AWS_60] Ensure IAM role allows only specific services or principals to assume it
[NONE][CKV_AWS_110] Ensure IAM policies does not allow privilege escalation
[NONE][CKV_AWS_108] Ensure IAM policies does not allow data exfiltration
[NONE][CKV_AWS_111] Ensure IAM policies does not allow write access without constraints
[NONE][CKV_AWS_107] Ensure IAM policies does not allow credentials exposure
[NONE][CKV_AWS_63] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's actions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_109] Ensure IAM policies does not allow permissions management without constraints
[NONE][CKV_AWS_62] Ensure no IAM policies that allow full "*-*" administrative privileges are not created

[NONE][CKV_AWS_40] Ensure IAM policies are attached only to groups or roles (Reducing access management complexity may in-turn reduce opportunity for a principal to inadvertently receive or retain excessive privileges.)
[NONE][CKV_AWS_110] Ensure IAM policies does not allow privilege escalation

failure.message: Ensure IAM policies does not allow data exfiltration

testcase.failure:
Resource: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy.RiskyIAMPolicy File: /stack4.yaml: 5-14 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-iam-policies/ensure-iam-policies-do-not-allow-data-exfiltration
5 | RiskyIAMPolicy: 6 | Type: 'AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy' 7 | Properties: 8 | ManagedPolicyName: 'CheckovTestRiskyPolicy' 9 | PolicyDocument: 10 | Version: '2012-10-17' 11 | Statement: 12 | - Effect: 'Allow' 13 | Action: '*' 14 | Resource: '*'

testcase.name: [NONE][CHI_POLICY_IAM_001] Do not attach overly permissive AWS managed policies to IAM roles

failure.message: Do not attach overly permissive AWS managed policies to IAM roles

testcase.failure:
Resource: AWS::IAM::Role.S3FullAdminRole File: /stack3.yaml: 6-18 Guideline: Roles must not have AdministratorAccess or AmazonS3FullAccess AWS managed policies attached.
6 | S3FullAdminRole: 7 | Type: AWS::IAM::Role 8 | Properties: 9 | RoleName: stack3-s3-full-admin-role 10 | AssumeRolePolicyDocument: 11 | Version: "2012-10-17" 12 | Statement: 13 | - Effect: Allow 14 | Principal: 15 | Service: ec2.amazonaws.com 16 | Action: sts:AssumeRole 17 | ManagedPolicyArns: 18 | - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonS3FullAccess
